raw.headline: Reported Earlier: Eight Leading U.S. Communications Firms Form C2 ISAC To Strengthen Cybersecurity Collaboration

headline: Eight Leading U.S. Communications Firms Form C2 ISAC to Strengthen Cybersecurity Collaboration
summary: Eight of the nation's leading communications companies – AT&T, Charter, Comcast, Cox, Lumen Technologies, T-Mobile, Verizon, and Zayo – have established the Communications Cybersecurity Information Sharing and Analysis Center, known as C2 ISAC. The new non-profit is dedicated to strengthening cybersecurity across the communications sector.

headline: AT&T (T) Valuation Check After New Satellite Connectivity Joint Venture With T-Mobile And Verizon
summary: AT&T (T) stock is back in focus after the company, alongside T-Mobile and Verizon, outlined plans for a new joint venture that would pool spectrum for satellite supported mobile coverage across the United States. See our latest analysis for AT&T. AT&T's share price has eased in recent months, with a 30 day share price return down 7.85% and a 90 day return down 14.82%. At the same time, the satellite joint venture and recent conference update keep attention on its longer term position,...

headline: T-Mobile rolls back 2 customer discount changes after backlash
summary: T-Mobile is reversing course on two recent policy changes that sparked backlash because the updates restricted customer discounts. The move follows an uptick in customer losses in recent months. Customer retention has been an ongoing challenge for T-Mobile as consumers nationwide grow more ...

headline: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From Array’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Array’s first quarter was marked by a sharp decline in revenue and earnings per share relative to analyst expectations. Management attributed this divergence to strong progress in tower tenancy growth and successful efforts monetizing spectrum assets. CEO Walter Carlson highlighted the closing of a spectrum sale to T-Mobile and ongoing efforts to secure additional regulatory approvals for further transactions. Meanwhile, the company noted the positive impact of operational discipline and a shift
